parameters.sqlQuery:
/* STEP 1: Normalize domain_type values */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  domain_type = CASE
    WHEN LOWER(domain_type) IN ('renew', 'renewal') THEN 'renew'
    WHEN LOWER(domain_type) IN ('new', 'registration', 'create') THEN 'new'
    WHEN LOWER(domain_type) IN ('premium new', 'premium_new', 'premiumnew') THEN 'premium new'
    WHEN LOWER(domain_type) IN ('premium renew', 'premium_renew', 'premiumrenew') THEN 'premium renew'
    ELSE LOWER(domain_type)
  END
WHERE TRUE;


/* STEP 2: Flag invalid domain_type */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'INCORRECT_DOMAIN_TYPE',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(domain_type) NOT IN ('new', 'renew', 'premium new', 'premium renew')
  AND validation_error IS NULL;


/* STEP 3: Flag invalid domain names */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'INVALID_DOMAIN_NAME',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE NET.REG_DOMAIN(domain) IS NULL
  AND validation_error IS NULL;


/* STEP 4: Flag duplicate domains */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'DUPLICATE_ENTRY',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE domain IN (
  SELECT domain
  FROM (
    SELECT
      domain,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY domain
        ORDER BY created_at
      ) AS rn
    FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
    WHERE validation_error IS NULL
  )
  WHERE rn > 1
);


/* STEP 5: Flag missing domain */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE (domain IS NULL OR TRIM(domain) = '')
  AND validation_error IS NULL;


/* STEP 6: Flag missing domain_type */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_DOMAIN_TYPE',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE (domain_type IS NULL OR TRIM(domain_type) = '')
  AND validation_error IS NULL;


/* STEP 7: Flag missing date */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_DATE',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE date IS NULL
  AND validation_error IS NULL;


/* STEP 8: Flag missing client */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_CLIENT',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE (client IS NULL OR TRIM(client) = '')
  AND validation_error IS NULL;


/* STEP 9: Reclassify premium new domains */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS r
SET
  domain_type = 'premium new',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM `radix_data.premium_newreg` AS p
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(p.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'new';


/* STEP 10: Reclassify premium renew domains */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS r
SET
  domain_type = 'premium renew',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM `radix_data.premium_renews` AS p
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(p.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'renew';


/* STEP 11: Flag missing MBG for new */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_NEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'new'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.newreg` AS n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* STEP 12: Flag missing MBG for renew */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_RENEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'renew'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.renews` AS n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* STEP 13: Flag missing MBG for premium new */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_PREMIUM_NEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'premium new'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.premium_newreg` AS n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* STEP 14: Flag missing MBG for premium renew */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS r
SET
  validation_error = 'MISSING_MBG_FOR_PREMIUM_RENEW_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'premium renew'
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM `radix_data.premium_renews` AS n
    WHERE LOWER(n.domain) = LOWER(r.domain)
      AND n.mbg IS NULL
  );


/* STEP 15: Set bundled flag from promo_tag */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  bundled = IF(TRIM(COALESCE(promo_tag,'')) != '', TRUE, FALSE),
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE validation_error IS NULL;

WITH summary AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN validation_error IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('VALIDATION: ', validation_error)
      WHEN effective_price IS NULL THEN 'PRICING_UNRESOLVED'
      WHEN rebate IS NULL THEN 'REBATE_MISSING'
      ELSE 'SUCCESS'
    END AS result,
    COUNT(*) AS row_count
  FROM `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
  GROUP BY result
),
totals AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
    COUNTIF(validation_error IS NOT NULL) AS validation_failed,
    COUNTIF(validation_error IS NULL AND effective_price IS NOT NULL) AS priced_rows,
    COUNTIF(validation_error IS NULL AND rebate IS NOT NULL) AS rebate_calculated,
    COUNTIF(validation_error IS NULL AND effective_price IS NULL) AS pricing_unresolved,
    COUNTIF(validation_error IS NULL AND effective_price IS NOT NULL AND rebate IS NULL) AS rebate_missing,
    COUNTIF(validation_error IS NULL AND effective_price IS NOT NULL AND rebate IS NOT NULL) AS success_rows
  FROM `rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
)
SELECT CONCAT(
  '✅ Manual rebate processing completed', '\n\n',
  'Total rows: ', CAST(t.total_rows AS STRING), '\n',
  'Fully successful rows: ', CAST(t.success_rows AS STRING), '\n',
  'Validation failures: ', CAST(t.validation_failed AS STRING), '\n',
  'Pricing resolved: ', CAST(t.priced_rows AS STRING), '\n',
  'Rebates calculated: ', CAST(t.rebate_calculated AS STRING), '\n',
  'Pricing unresolved: ', CAST(t.pricing_unresolved AS STRING), '\n',
  'Rebate missing: ', CAST(t.rebate_missing AS STRING), '\n\n',
  'Breakup:', '\n',
  STRING_AGG(
    CONCAT('• ', s.result, ': ', CAST(s.row_count AS STRING)),
    '\n'
    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN s.result = 'SUCCESS' THEN 0
        WHEN s.result = 'PRICING_UNRESOLVED' THEN 1
        WHEN s.result = 'REBATE_MISSING' THEN 2
        ELSE 3
      END,
      s.row_count DESC,
      s.result
  )
) AS flock_message
FROM summary s
CROSS JOIN totals t
GROUP BY
  t.total_rows,
  t.success_rows,
  t.validation_failed,
  t.priced_rows,
  t.rebate_calculated,
  t.pricing_unresolved,
  t.rebate_missing;

/* STEP 1: Load source data for NEW */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS r
SET
  domain_id = CAST(n.domain_id AS STRING),
  createrenewdate = DATE(n.creation_date),
  period = n.period,
  registrar_shortname = n.registrar_shortname,
  client_shortname = n.client_shortname,
  registrar_id = n.registrar_userid,
  tld = n.tld,
  mbg = n.mbg,
  amount = n.amount,
  rebate_given = n.rebate_given,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      n.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY LOWER(n.domain)
        ORDER BY n.creation_date DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM `radix_data.newreg` AS n
  )
  WHERE rn = 1
) AS n
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(n.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'new';

/* STEP 2: Load source data for RENEW */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS r
SET
  domain_id = CAST(n.domain_id AS STRING),
  createrenewdate = DATE(n.renew_date),
  period = n.period,
  registrar_shortname = n.registrar_shortname,
  client_shortname = n.client_shortname,
  registrar_id = n.registrar_userid,
  tld = n.tld,
  mbg = n.mbg,
  amount = n.amount,
  rebate_given = n.rebate_given,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      n.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY LOWER(n.domain)
        ORDER BY n.renew_date DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM `radix_data.renews` AS n
  )
  WHERE rn = 1
) AS n
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(n.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) = 'renew';

/* STEP 3: Load source data for PREMIUM NEW */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS r
SET
  domain_type='premium new',
  domain_id = CAST(n.domain_id AS STRING),
  createrenewdate = DATE(n.creation_date),
  period = n.period,
  registrar_shortname = n.registrar_shortname,
  client_shortname = n.client_shortname,
  registrar_id = n.registrar_userid,
  tld = n.tld,
  mbg = n.mbg,
  amount = n.amount,
  rebate_given = n.rebate_given,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      n.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY LOWER(n.domain)
        ORDER BY n.creation_date DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM `radix_data.premium_newreg` AS n
  )
  WHERE rn = 1
) AS n
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(n.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) in ('new','premium new');

/* STEP 4: Load source data for PREMIUM RENEW */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS r
SET
   domain_type='premium renew',
  domain_id = CAST(n.domain_id AS STRING),
  createrenewdate = DATE(n.renew_date),
  period = n.period,
  registrar_shortname = n.registrar_shortname,
  client_shortname = n.client_shortname,
  registrar_id = n.registrar_userid,
  tld = n.tld,
  mbg = n.mbg,
  amount = n.amount,
  rebate_given = n.rebate_given,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      n.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY LOWER(n.domain)
        ORDER BY n.renew_date DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM `radix_data.premium_renews` AS n
  )
  WHERE rn = 1
) AS n
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(n.domain)
  AND LOWER(r.domain_type) in ('renew','premium renew');

/* =========================================================
STEP: FLAG OLD REGISTRATION / RENEWAL RECORDS

Logic:
- If createrenewdate is older than 180 days from today
- Mark the row as validation error
- Applies only where domain_id exists but record is too old
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'DATE_EXCEEDS_180_DAY_LIMIT',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE
  createrenewdate IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(createrenewdate) < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
  AND validation_error IS NULL;
/* =========================================================
STEP: FLAG DELETED DOMAINS

Logic:
- If domain_id is still NULL after all lookup steps
- Check whether the domain exists in cnic_dump.deleted
- If yes, mark it as deleted domain
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'DOMAIN_MARKED_AS_DELETED',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM `cnic_dump.deleted` d
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(d.domain)
  AND r.domain_id IS NULL
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL;
/* =========================================================
STEP: FLAG RESTORED DOMAINS
If domain exists in restore dump but was not matched earlier
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` r
SET
  validation_error = 'DOMAIN_FOUND_IN_RESTORE',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM `cnic_dump.restore` d
WHERE LOWER(r.domain) = LOWER(d.domain)
  AND r.domain_id IS NULL
  AND r.validation_error IS NULL;
/* =========================================================
STEP: FLAG DOMAINS NOT FOUND IN SYSTEM

Logic:
- If domain lookup steps did not populate domain_id
- Mark record as validation error
- Prevent further rebate processing
========================================================= */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FOR_DOMAIN_TYPE',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE
  domain_id IS NULL
  AND validation_error IS NULL;

/*mbg =1 validation*/
UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'MBG_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE COALESCE(mbg, 0) = 1
  AND validation_error IS NULL;

/* STEP 1: Apply comma-separated multi-year NEW ROI pricing as the base pass */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_first = r.effective,
  bq_promo_tag = r.promo_tag,
  effective_multi = r.effective_multi,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective) AS effective,
    MAX(r.effective_multi) AS effective_multi,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  INNER JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(n.client_shortname) = LOWER(r.reseller)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
  WHERE DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
    AND LOWER(r.type) = 'new'
    AND r.period LIKE '%,%'
    AND common_data.find_in_set(CAST(n.period AS STRING), r.period) IS NOT NULL
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
          ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
        END
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS r
WHERE a.domain_id = r.domain_id;


/* STEP 2: Apply first-year NEW ROI pricing for period 0/1 with custom-tag match */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_first = r.effective,
  bq_promo_tag = r.promo_tag,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective) AS effective,
    MAX(r.effective_multi) AS effective_multi,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  INNER JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(n.client_shortname) = LOWER(r.reseller)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
  WHERE DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
    AND LOWER(r.type) = 'new'
    AND r.period IN ('0', '1')
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
          ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
        END
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.promo_tag IS NOT NULL THEN LOWER(n.promo_tag) = LOWER(r.custom_tag)
          ELSE TRUE
        END
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS r
WHERE a.domain_id = r.domain_id
  AND (a.effective_first IS NULL OR a.bq_promo_tag IS NULL);

/* STEP 3: Apply fallback first-year NEW ROI pricing for period 0/1 without custom-tag filter */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_first = r.effective,
  bq_promo_tag = r.promo_tag,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective) AS effective,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  INNER JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(n.client_shortname) = LOWER(r.reseller)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
  WHERE DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
    AND LOWER(r.type) = 'new'
    AND r.period IN ('0', '1')
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
          ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
        END
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS r
WHERE a.domain_id = r.domain_id
  AND (a.effective_first IS NULL OR a.bq_promo_tag IS NULL);


/* STEP: Apply first-year ROI pricing for RENEW / PREMIUM RENEW */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_first = b.effective,
  bq_promo_tag = b.promo_tag,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective) AS effective,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  LEFT JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(r.reseller) = LOWER(n.client_shortname)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
   AND DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
   AND LOWER(r.type) = 'renew'
   AND CASE
         WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
         ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
       END
  WHERE LOWER(n.domain_type) IN ('renew', 'premium renew')
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS b
WHERE b.domain_id = a.domain_id;


/* STEP 1: Apply comma-separated multi-year PREMIUM NEW ROI pricing as the base pass */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_first = r.effective,
  bq_promo_tag = r.promo_tag,
  effective_multi = r.effective_multi,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective) AS effective,
    MAX(r.effective_multi) AS effective_multi,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  INNER JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(n.client_shortname) = LOWER(r.reseller)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
  WHERE LOWER(n.domain_type) = 'premium new'
    AND DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
    AND LOWER(r.type) = 'premium new'
    AND r.period LIKE '%,%'
    AND common_data.find_in_set(CAST(n.period AS STRING), r.period) IS NOT NULL
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
          ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
        END
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS r
WHERE a.domain_id = r.domain_id;

/* STEP 2: Apply first-year PREMIUM NEW ROI pricing for period 0/1 with custom-tag match */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_first = r.effective,
  bq_promo_tag = r.promo_tag,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective) AS effective,
    MAX(r.effective_multi) AS effective_multi,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  INNER JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(n.client_shortname) = LOWER(r.reseller)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
  WHERE LOWER(n.domain_type) = 'premium new'
    AND DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
    AND LOWER(r.type) = 'premium new'
    AND r.period IN ('0', '1')
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
          ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
        END
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.promo_tag IS NOT NULL THEN LOWER(n.promo_tag) = LOWER(r.custom_tag)
          ELSE TRUE
        END
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS r
WHERE a.domain_id = r.domain_id
  AND (a.effective_first IS NULL OR a.bq_promo_tag IS NULL);

/* STEP 3: Apply fallback first-year PREMIUM NEW ROI pricing for period 0/1 without custom-tag filter */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_first = r.effective,
  bq_promo_tag = r.promo_tag,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective) AS effective,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  INNER JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(n.client_shortname) = LOWER(r.reseller)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
  WHERE LOWER(n.domain_type) = 'premium new'
    AND DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
    AND LOWER(r.type) = 'premium new'
    AND r.period IN ('0', '1')
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
          ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
        END
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS r
WHERE a.domain_id = r.domain_id
  AND (a.effective_first IS NULL OR a.bq_promo_tag IS NULL);

/* STEP 1: Apply CNIC fallback for NEW / PREMIUM NEW effective_multi */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_multi = b.effective_price_amt,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM `falcon.cnic_records` AS b
WHERE LOWER(a.registrar_shortname) = LOWER(b.registrar)
  AND LOWER(a.tld) = LOWER(b.tld)
  AND TIMESTAMP(a.createrenewdate) BETWEEN TIMESTAMP(DATETIME(b.start_date, b.start_time))
                                      AND TIMESTAMP(DATETIME(b.end_date, b.end_time))
  AND LOWER(b.type) = 'renewal'
  AND LOWER(a.domain_type) IN ('new', 'premium new')
  AND a.effective_multi IS NULL;
/* STEP 2: Apply standard-price fallback for NEW / PREMIUM NEW effective_multi */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_multi = b.standard_price,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM `common_data.tld_std_price` AS b
WHERE LOWER(a.tld) = LOWER(b.tld)
  AND DATE(a.createrenewdate) BETWEEN b.start_date AND b.end_date
  AND LOWER(a.domain_type) IN ('new', 'premium new')
  AND a.effective_multi IS NULL;

/* STEP 3: Derive final effective_price for NEW / PREMIUM NEW */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  effective_price = effective_first + (effective_multi * (period - 1)),
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(domain_type) IN ('new', 'premium new')
  AND effective_price IS NULL
  AND effective_first IS NOT NULL
  AND effective_multi IS NOT NULL
  AND period IS NOT NULL;

/* STEP 1: Apply explicit multi-year NEW ROI pricing with custom-tag match */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_price = r.effective_multi,
  effective_multi = r.effective_multi,
  bq_promo_tag = r.promo_tag,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective_multi) AS effective_multi,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  INNER JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(n.client_shortname) = LOWER(r.reseller)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
  WHERE DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
    AND LOWER(r.type) = 'new'
    AND r.period NOT LIKE '%,%'
    AND CAST(r.period AS INT64) > 1
    AND n.period = CAST(r.period AS INT64)
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
          ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
        END
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.promo_tag IS NOT NULL THEN LOWER(n.promo_tag) = LOWER(r.custom_tag)
          ELSE TRUE
        END
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS r
WHERE a.domain_id = r.domain_id
  AND a.effective_price IS NULL;


/* STEP 2: Apply fallback explicit multi-year NEW ROI pricing without custom-tag filter */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_price = r.effective_multi,
  effective_multi = r.effective_multi,
  bq_promo_tag = r.promo_tag,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective_multi) AS effective_multi,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  INNER JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(n.client_shortname) = LOWER(r.reseller)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
  WHERE DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
    AND LOWER(r.type) = 'new'
    AND r.period NOT LIKE '%,%'
    AND CAST(r.period AS INT64) > 1
    AND n.period = CAST(r.period AS INT64)
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
          ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
        END
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS r
WHERE a.domain_id = r.domain_id
  AND a.effective_price IS NULL;

/* STEP 1: Apply explicit multi-year PREMIUM NEW ROI pricing with custom-tag match */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_price = r.effective_multi,
  effective_multi = r.effective_multi,
  bq_promo_tag = r.promo_tag,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective_multi) AS effective_multi,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  INNER JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(n.client_shortname) = LOWER(r.reseller)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
  WHERE LOWER(n.domain_type) = 'premium new'
    AND DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
    AND LOWER(r.type) = 'premium new'
    AND r.period NOT LIKE '%,%'
    AND CAST(r.period AS INT64) > 1
    AND n.period = CAST(r.period AS INT64)
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
          ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
        END
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.promo_tag IS NOT NULL THEN LOWER(n.promo_tag) = LOWER(r.custom_tag)
          ELSE TRUE
        END
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS r
WHERE a.domain_id = r.domain_id
  AND a.effective_price IS NULL;

/* STEP 2: Apply fallback explicit multi-year PREMIUM NEW ROI pricing without custom-tag filter */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS a
SET
  effective_price = r.effective_multi,
  effective_multi = r.effective_multi,
  bq_promo_tag = r.promo_tag,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
FROM (
  SELECT
    n.domain_id,
    MAX(r.effective_multi) AS effective_multi,
    MAX(r.promo_tag) AS promo_tag
  FROM `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data` AS n
  INNER JOIN `falcon.roi_records` AS r
    ON LOWER(n.client_shortname) = LOWER(r.reseller)
   AND LOWER(n.registrar_id) = LOWER(r.registrar_id)
   AND LOWER(n.tld) = LOWER(r.tld)
  WHERE LOWER(n.domain_type) = 'premium new'
    AND DATE(n.createrenewdate) BETWEEN DATE(r.start_date) AND DATE(r.end_date)
    AND LOWER(r.type) = 'premium new'
    AND r.period NOT LIKE '%,%'
    AND CAST(r.period AS INT64) > 1
    AND n.period = CAST(r.period AS INT64)
    AND CASE
          WHEN n.bundled = TRUE THEN r.bundle = TRUE
          ELSE r.bundle = FALSE
        END
  GROUP BY n.domain_id
) AS r
WHERE a.domain_id = r.domain_id
  AND a.effective_price IS NULL;

/* STEP 1: Derive effective_price for RENEW / PREMIUM RENEW */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  effective_price = effective_first * period,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE LOWER(domain_type) IN ('renew', 'premium renew')
  AND effective_price IS NULL
  AND effective_first IS NOT NULL
  AND period IS NOT NULL;

/* STEP 2: Calculate rebate where rebate_given exists */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  rebate = ROUND((amount - rebate_given) - effective_price, 2),
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE rebate_given IS NOT NULL
  AND effective_price IS NOT NULL
  AND (amount - rebate_given) >= effective_price;

/* STEP 3: Calculate fallback rebate from amount */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  rebate = ROUND(amount - effective_price, 2),
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE rebate IS NULL
  AND effective_price IS NOT NULL
  AND amount IS NOT NULL;

/* STEP 4: Mark pricing-unrealized rows */

UPDATE `radixbi-249015.rebate_process_temp.rebate_cleaned_data`
SET
  validation_error = 'UNREALIZED_DOMAIN',
  status = 'ERROR',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE rebate IS NULL
  AND effective_first IS NULL
  AND validation_error IS NULL;
